# matomo_tagmanager_environments (Data Source)

Lists every Tag Manager publish environment (e.g. "live", "dev", "staging") configured on this Matomo instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "matomo_tagmanager_environments" "all" {}

output "available_environments" {
  value = [for e in data.matomo_tagmanager_environments.all.environments : e.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `environments` (Attributes List) Every configured environment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--environments))
- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier for this data source, always "environments".

<a id="nestedatt--environments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `environments`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The environment's id, e.g. "live".
- `name` (String) The environment's display name.
